description: Phase 1 MVP: Auth + DB infrastructure, Procore integration, mock Sage data, construction analytics visualizations

userStories.title: Fix build configuration and add typecheck/lint scripts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the project to build cleanly with proper quality check scripts.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run typecheck passes with zero errors

userStories.title: Database migration to Neon
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Drizzle schema pushed to Neon so the app has a working database.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json has db:generate, db:push, db:studio scripts
npm run db:push successfully pushes schema to Neon (tables: users, data_connections, synced_projects)
userStories.notes: DATABASE_URL is in .env.local. Use drizzle-kit push for Neon.

userStories.title: Clerk auth flow verification
userStories.description: As a user, I want to sign in/sign up and access the protected dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page (/) shows sign-in/sign-up buttons when logged out
userStories.notes: Clerk keys are in .env.local. Middleware is at src/middleware.ts.

userStories.title: Procore OAuth flow — authorization and callback
userStories.description: As a user, I want to connect my Procore account via OAuth.
acceptanceCriteria: /api/procore/auth route redirects to Procore OAuth URL with client_id, redirect_uri, response_type=code
/api/procore/callback exchanges code for access_token and refresh_token
Tokens stored in data_connections table linked to current Clerk user
Integrations page has Connect Procore button triggering OAuth
After connection sidebar shows Procore as Connected
userStories.notes: Procore sandbox credentials in .env.local. Auth URL: https://login.procore.com/oauth/authorize. Token URL: https://login.procore.com/oauth/token. API base: https://sandbox.procore.com

userStories.title: Procore data sync — fetch projects from sandbox
userStories.description: As a user, I want to sync my Procore projects to see them in the dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: /api/procore/sync fetches projects from Procore REST API v1.1
Projects stored in synced_projects table with source=procore
Integrations page has Sync Now button for Procore
userStories.notes: Use GET /rest/v1.1/projects with Authorization: Bearer {token} and Procore-Company-Id header. Company ID comes from user's Procore connection.

userStories.title: Mock Sage Intacct financial data and DataProvider
userStories.description: As a developer, I need realistic mock financial data and a DataProvider interface.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/data/mock/ has files: projects.ts, financials.ts, change-orders.ts, schedules.ts, aging.ts
Per-project cost breakdown: labor, materials, subcontract, equipment, overhead (budget/actual/committed)
12-month EVM data per project (PV, EV, AC)
userStories.notes: Use types from src/lib/types/procore.ts and src/lib/types/sage.ts. Data should be realistic for construction: project values $10M-$70M, varied completion percentages.

userStories.title: Dashboard overview — KPI cards and summary charts
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see key portfolio metrics at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 KPI cards: Active Projects, Total Contract Value, Avg CPI, At Risk Projects
Project Status donut chart (Recharts PieChart) showing projects by stage
Revenue vs Expense area chart showing 12-month trend
Charts have tooltips, legends, responsive sizing
Dark theme styling (amber-500 accent, slate backgrounds)
userStories.notes: Replace the placeholder KPI cards and empty state on /dashboard page. Use Recharts PieChart and AreaChart.

userStories.title: Project health scatter plot and project list table
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see project health matrix and browse all projects.
acceptanceCriteria: Scatter plot: X=Schedule% Y=Budget%, colored green/yellow/red by health
Data table: Name, Type, Value, % Complete, Budget Status, Stage
Table sortable by column headers (TanStack Table)
userStories.notes: Add scatter to /dashboard below summary charts. Project list at /projects page.

userStories.title: Project detail — cost breakdown and EVM chart
userStories.description: As a user, I want detailed cost analysis for a specific project.
acceptanceCriteria: Project header with name, type, dates, value, percent complete
Stacked bar chart: cost categories with Budget vs Actual vs Committed
EVM multi-line chart: PV, EV, AC over 12 months
EVM KPI badges: CPI, SPI, Cost Variance, Schedule Variance
Data source badges showing Procore and Sage Intacct on relevant sections
userStories.notes: Page at /projects/[id]. Use mock data provider. CPI=EV/AC, SPI=EV/PV.

userStories.title: Financials page — cash flow, aging, change order waterfall
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see financial health across my portfolio.
acceptanceCriteria: Cash flow combo chart: bar (AR/AP by month) + line (net cash flow)
AR/AP aging grouped bar chart with 5 buckets
Change order waterfall chart for selected project
userStories.notes: Page at /financials. Use Recharts ComposedChart for combo, BarChart for aging. Waterfall can be implemented with stacked bars (invisible base + visible delta).

userStories.title: Integrations page, loading states, and visual polish
userStories.description: As a user, I want a polished, professional dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Integrations page (/integrations) with Procore and Sage Intacct cards
Procore card: Connect button or Connected status with last sync time
Sage Intacct card: Coming Soon state
userStories.notes: Integrations page at /integrations. Add loading states using shadcn Skeleton component.
